title: Phase 7: Move and clean up test files
description:
Move internal-focused tests into their respective packages:
- subtree_test.go → internal/subtree/
- stack_test.go → internal/stack/ (if not already handled in Phase 2)
- tree_test.go, tree_cursor_test.go → internal/tree/
- query_test.go → internal/query/

Delete ~14 untracked debug test files.

Keep in root: api_test.go (public API integration tests), corpus, regression, benchmark, fuzz, grammar batch tests (cross-cutting integration tests that exercise the full stack).

Verify all tests pass after moves.
